input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Validation is on a proxy quantity correlated with, but not equal to, the decision QoI.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 purpose-specific validation; proto-taxonomy D-VAL-08

case_context.cou: surrogate sets end-of-life from internal resistance under fast charge

answer_key.gold_mechanism: Validation is on capacity fade, a proxy that correlates with the COU's internal-resistance QoI historically but diverges under the fast-charge profile; the decision quantity is not separately validated.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.scope: internal-resistance accuracy under the COU profile

forbidden_claims: asserts the resistance prediction is wrong (a verdict the proxy mismatch does not support)
treats capacity-fade validation as validation of the resistance QoI

hardness.obvious_signal: the surrogate is validated and the reported error on capacity fade is low (2%)
hardness.conflicting_signal: the COU decision is end-of-life from internal resistance growth, not capacity fade; the two correlate historically but diverge under the COU's fast-charge profile, and internal-resistance accuracy is not separately validated

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 purpose-specific validation: the validation quantity must be the decision QoI; a correlated proxy that diverges in the COU regime does not validate it.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
